title: Copper Golem Hats
description: Put any item on copper golems!
body:
![minecraft datapack copper golem hats mod](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/copper_golem_hats.png)
[![jodeks discord - discord badge - pixel badge - pixel discord badge - jodeks datapacks - datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![copper golem hats minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Fashionable-Copper-Golems/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi - jodek kofi - minecraft datapack kofi donation]( https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek donation datapacks minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
## Put item on copper golem Shift + Right click with the item in your hand ![https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Assets/blob/main/gifs/fashionable_copper_golem_equip.gif?raw=true](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Assets/blob/main/gifs/fashionable_copper_golem_equip.gif?raw=true) ## Remove item from copper golem Sift + Right click with a shear ![https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Assets/blob/main/gifs/fashionable_copper_golem_shear.gif?raw=true](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Assets/blob/main/gifs/fashionable_copper_golem_shear.gif?raw=true)
